text:
On a small island just off the coast of France, under the vibrant azure sky, lived a cheerful little rabbit named Ribsy. Ribsy's winter boots were always adorned with tiny pine cones, and her fur was a soft shade of blue. She lived in a burrow lined with bunches of fresh lavender.

One particular day, after a snowfall that blanketed the island in a thick white blanket, Ribsy decided she yearned for the sunnier parts of Italy. She set off on an adventure. It seemed that across the sea lay an ancient, glittering castle rumored to have incredible views.

Ribsy trotted eagerly until she reached the edge of a deep forest shimmering under orange twilight. Though afraid sometimes of the dark deep woods, her stomach grew hollow with longing. She ventured deeper, her heart swelling with ambition. 

Hours passed, and deep into her adventure she discovered an overgrown path. As she pressed on, soft torches flickered ahead. Ribsy paused;
